kinds.backslash-newline:
insert \
 between the executable and subcommand words
kinds.backtick-wrap: wrap the subcommand word in backticks
kinds.unquoted-expansion: insert the word $X before the subcommand word
kinds.subshell-wrap: wrap the whole span in ( and )
